mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.code AS "code", a.day AS "day", a.isdui AS "isdui", a.uid AS "u.id", a.dui_time AS "duiTime", a.sync_status AS "syncStatus", a.type AS "type", a.type_name AS "typeName", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate", u.idno AS "idno", u.idno AS "u.idno", u.nickname AS "u.nickname"
LEFT JOIN t_member u ON u.id = a.uid
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_vip_code( id, code, day, isdui, uid, dui_time, sync_status, type, type_name, create_date, update_date ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.code}, #{item.day}, #{item.isdui}, #{item.u.id}, #{item.duiTime}, #{item.syncStatus}, #{item.type}, #{item.typeName}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.updateDate} )

INSERT INTO t_vip_code( id, code, day, isdui, uid, dui_time, sync_status, type, type_name, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{code}, #{day}, #{isdui}, #{u.id}, #{duiTime}, #{syncStatus}, #{type}, #{typeName}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_vip_code
code = #{code},
day = #{day},
isdui = #{isdui},
uid = #{u.id},
dui_time = #{duiTime},
sync_status = #{syncStatus},
type = #{type},
type_name = #{typeName},
update_date = #{updateDate},
WHERE id = #{id}
